'''''Return of the Jedi Annual'' 1983''' was a hardcover comic magazine released as a special edition of [[Star Wars (Marvel UK)|Marvel UK's ''Star Wars'']] comic magazine. It collected the entire [[Star Wars: Return of the Jedi (1983)|''Return of the Jedi'']] comic series.

==Contents==
*[[Return of the Jedi 1|''Return of the Jedi'' 1]]
*[[Return of the Jedi 2|''Return of the Jedi'' 2]]
*[[Return of the Jedi 3|''Return of the Jedi'' 3]]
*[[Return of the Jedi 4|''Return of the Jedi'' 4]]
